xxs.description: Only to be used in very rare exceptions!

focus.description: Used for focus outlines, borders and inner shadows.

default.description: Body text, input-filled text, headers, all the basic text types

caption.description: Small captions, subtle icons, image descriptions, nonessential text

default.description: Divider, card, table header.
Shows additional info to keep the user informed. Doesn’t require any immediate action.
Communicates to users that a specific action or task has been completed successfully.
Indicates that something could(!) happen and it depends on the user's response to it.

Error, invalid, Indicates that something has happened, error messages: critical info like ‘the wrong password’,  ‘you run out of credits’. NOTE: The danger color has a custom tint not from the main palette. It is required to pass the WCAG 2.2 AA contrast requirement.
Informative, but static. Does not require any action from the user.
Buttons, radio buttons, checkboxes, and other main/active components – *** Note: that a secondary color by the brand guidelines. The primary brand color is – Honey.

canvas.description: The application’s main background lying behind everything.

default.description: The main surface, most content lies on it. *** Surfaces work independently from elevations, instead representing internal separation. There might be two different surface levels with the same elevation, as well as two different elevations with the same surface level.

text.description: This is a default token which is used by default when no any other value can be applyed
